title: The Monster Spawned Official Pack [Vanilla Edition]
description: The official Monster Spawned modpack for the vanilla side of things...
body:
# Monster Spawned [Vanilla Edition]

## What It Is

This is the official modpack for the Monster Spawned: Minecraft [Vanilla Edition] server. In conjunction with the [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) (or a similar client), you will be able to download, update, and load the necessary mods needed to play the server and still be able to enjoy Minecraft as in its days of glory.

This pack features some QOL (quality of life) tweaks, gameplay stability improvements, as well as various tweaks and fixes to make the game more enjoyable and stable.

## Who It's For

This pack was designed with the ease of distribution for the players of the Monster Spawned server in mind, in addition being able to comply with not uploading and redistributing mods in a manner that was against the mod author's and mod platform's permission.

It aims to provide a sense of fill for the nostalgic player that misses the golden age of Minecraft, yet still wants to play casually and not be overly competitive in a world driven mad by the competitive nature of eSports.

It is completely optional to use, and was made with the intent to not mess with the Minecraft multiplayer mode in any game-changing fashion, outside of disabling chat reporting (for the good of all players).

## Mod/Resource Pack List

The modpack is built using the mods, resource packs, and other data found on the latest version of the "Dependency" list, found at this page: [link](https://modrinth.com/modpack/ms-vanilla/version/latest). The above-mentioned link will **always** contain the latest version of the pack's dependencies and data included.

## Plans/To-Do:

* Do performance profiling job on the pack and see how it can be improved (in terms of performance)
* Add a custom mod to help with various aspects of the project (update notifications, in-game news, etc.)

## Contact

If you have any questions, please feel free to contact me via my website's contact page [here](https://themoddersden/contact). I am also on Discord at: `TheModdersDen` (Please mention the pack when reaching out on this platform).

I will do my best to respond in a reasonable time. :)
